case_title: ASHLEY BATZ ET AL VS. STRUCTURE PROPERTIES

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $0. SERVED MAY-22-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STRUCTURE PROPERTIES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NEHA MURTI, PROPERTY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT STRUCTURE PROPERTIES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,300.00 FILED BY BATZ, ASHLEY WESTON, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT STRUCTURE PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-23-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING. PLAINTIFF ASHLEY BATZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM WESTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STRUCTURE PROPERTIES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NEHA MURTI, PROPERTY MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BATZ, ASHLEY WESTON, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STRUCTURE PROPERTIES $1,906.59 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,981.59 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
